_note: §6a decodability envelopes. Keyed by `decodableWithin` skill id. `graphemes` = every grapheme tile allowed at/before that skill; `highFrequency` = tricky words permitted despite not being fully decodable. A word passes if it segments entirely into allowed graphemes (greedy longest-match) or is on the HF list. Only phonics/spelling strands are decodability-checked.
